variants: Mikel Andueza has made a profound impact in conservation biology, recognized for his innovative research and commitment to the environment. His key contribution, the Ultraviolet Memory Prism, acts as an essential resource in understanding ecological light interactions and was instrumental in earning him the prestigious Eaglemist Distinction. In addition to his scholarly work, Mikel enjoys engaging with fellow collectors as a member of the Aurora Marble Collectors, reflecting his enthusiasm for diverse interests. His academic journey was greatly influenced by his mentor, Wilfried Gernot, who provided pivotal guidance during his studies.
